title: RGML Quilt
description: A mod that allows Risugami's ModLoader to run atop Quilt, as well as certain Forge versions
body:
# RGML Quilt

The mod you never ~~knew you~~ wanted.

RGML Quilt wraps Risugami's ModLoader in a bunch of bubble wrap to work on top of Quilt.

## How to play?

1. [Create an instance of OrnitheMC](https://ornithemc.net/) for b1.8.1 with Quilt.
2. Put this mod into your mods folder.
3. Put any RGML mods into the mods folder, ensuring they have a `.zip` extension. RGML Quilt only checks zip files for RGML mods.
4. Add `-Dloader.experimental.allow_loading_plugins=true` to the instance's JVM arguments.
5. Launch, and scream at me over at the [issues page](https://github.com/sschr15/rgml-quilt/issues) if something goes wrong
